steps.title: Find the shared input $c$
steps.content: Since $p$ has slope $7$, write $p(x)=7x+b$. Use $p(3)=30$: $$7(3)+b=30,$$ so $b=9$. Then solve $p(c)=-5$: $$7c+9=-5,$$ so $c=-2$.

steps.title: Fit the line for $t$
steps.content: Now $t(c)=-4$ means $t(-2)=-4$, and the other point is $t(4)=44$. The slope of $t$ is $$\frac{44-(-4)}{4-(-2)}=\frac{48}{6}=8.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The slope of $y=t(x)$ is $8$, which matches the correct answer, D. By hand, $\dfrac{44-(-4)}{4-(-2)}=\dfrac{48}{6}=8$.
